Mad Egg Labs

Privacy Policy for Mad Egg Labs, LLC

Effective Date: May 1, 2026

At Mad Egg Labs, we believe your data belongs to you. Whether you are visiting our website or using our mobile applications, our philosophy is the same: we provide information, we don’t collect it.

Website data

Applies to: MadEggLabs.com

When you browse our website, you are completely anonymous to us.

  • No collection: We do not collect, store, or share any personal information.
  • No tracking: We do not track your IP address, location, or device information.
  • No cookies: We do not use cookies, pixels, or any other tracking technologies.
  • External links: This website may contain links to external sites. Mad Egg Labs is not responsible for the privacy practices of external sites.

App data

Applies to: Is it Yacht Rock?

Our mobile applications are designed with privacy as a core feature.

  • Zero personal data: The app does not collect, transmit, or store any personally identifiable information (PII).
  • Audio privacy: Is it Yacht Rock? uses ShazamKit to identify music. Audio samples are processed locally on your device to create a “signature” which is then sent to Apple’s Shazam service. Their data usage is governed by Apple’s Privacy Policy. Mad Egg Labs never hears, records, or stores your audio.
  • On-device storage: Your “Match History” is stored locally on your device using SwiftData. This data never leaves your device and is not accessible by Mad Egg Labs.
  • Apple analytics: If you have opted-in to share crash reports and usage statistics with developers via iOS settings, Apple may provide us with anonymous, aggregated data. This cannot be used to identify you.
  • External links: Is it Yacht Rock? may contain links to external sites. Mad Egg Labs is not responsible for the privacy practices of external sites.

Contacting us

If you choose to contact us via email, we will only use your email address to respond to your inquiry. We will never sell your contact information or add you to a marketing list without your explicit permission.

Changes to this policy

If we ever change how our site or apps work, we will update this page. However, our core philosophy will always be to provide information, not collect it.

Questions? Reach out to us at .

Copyright © 2026 Mad Egg Labs, LLC. All rights reserved. Privacy
